# Corpus layout

Your private instance keeps prepared data in `structured_database/`.

## Required files (created by `medbots init`)

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `manifest.json` | Index of all PDFs → `pdf_text/`, `doc_text/` |
| `PATIENT_PROFILE.json` | Owner DOB and display name |
| `LABS_NORMALIZED.json` | Normalized lab rows (filled by pipeline) |
| `pdf_text/*.txt` | Raw text extracted from PDFs |
| `doc_text/*.md` | Structured documents with YAML frontmatter |
| `labs/LOINC_MAP.tsv` | Map `canonical_key` → LOINC code |

## Generated by pipeline

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `CORPUS_INDEX.json` | Summary counts and file navigation |
| `DISCREPANCIES.json` | Conflicts, gaps, stale data |
| `LIVING_HEALTH_SUMMARY.md` | Human-readable health summary (optional) |
| `GOALS_REMINDERS.json` | Goals from consultations (optional) |
| `TIMELINE_EVENTS.json` | Chronology (optional) |

## manifest.json entry

```json
{
  "source_pdf": "sources/emias/2024-01-15__lab.pdf",
  "source_system": "emias",
  "doc_type": "lab",
  "created_at": "2024-01-15T12:00:00Z",
  "extracted_txt": "pdf_text/sources__emias__....txt",
  "doc_text": "doc_text/2024-01-15_lab.md",
  "structured_locally_at": "2024-01-16T10:00:00Z"
}
```

Use `medbots scan` to register new PDFs — do not edit `manifest.json` by hand unless needed.

## Sources layout

```
sources/
├── emias/*.pdf
├── medsi/**/*.pdf
└── gemotest/**/*.pdf
```

PDF files stay in `sources/` (local only). Only text and JSON are synced to VPS.

## bot_config.json

Copy from `bot_config.example.json`. Key fields:

- `bot_id` — instance name
- `vps_corpus_path` — remote path for rsync (optional)
- `features` — toggle pipeline steps (`goals_reminders`, `genetics`, etc.)

Override flags: `MEDBOTS_FEATURE_<NAME>=0|1`
